headline: Asia-Pacific markets mostly rise in Easter trade on hopes for Hormuz reopening
summary: South Korea's Kospi led gains in the region while Japan's Nikkei 225 also opened higher. The Australian and Hong Kong markets were closed for the Easter weekend.

headline: Halliburton Strengthens Automation With Strategic Sekal Buyout
summary: HAL acquires Sumitomo's Sekal to boost drilling automation, aiming to cut costs, improve efficiency and accelerate digital well construction globally.

raw.headline: Halliburton Strengthens Automation With Strategic Sekal Buyout
raw.summary: HAL acquires Sumitomo's Sekal to boost drilling automation, aiming to cut costs, improve efficiency and accelerate digital well construction globally.

headline: Halliburton buys Sekal from Sumitomo to bolster drilling automation
summary: The combined platform will incorporate Halliburton’s LOGIX Automated Geosteering service to help improve reservoir access and consistency.

raw.headline: Halliburton buys Sekal from Sumitomo to bolster drilling automation
raw.summary: The combined platform will incorporate Halliburton’s LOGIX Automated Geosteering service to help improve reservoir access and consistency.

headline: Halliburton Buys Sekal As Investors Weigh Automation And Valuation Upside
summary: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) has acquired Sekal AS, a digital drilling autonomy company, to expand its drilling automation capabilities. The deal brings together Halliburton’s LOGIX autonomous drilling platform with Sekal’s DrillTronics software for more integrated automated drilling solutions. The acquisition signals a stronger push into digital drilling and automation within Halliburton’s oilfield services portfolio. headline: Trump’s threat to hit Iran 'extremely hard' jolts global stocks, bonds and oil
summary: Investor sentiment quickly soured as Trump's speech went on, sending assets across the board lower in international markets.
